name: Chains Alt Scenario | Prison
description:
AnyPOV!Prison Nurse!User x Mean!Convict!Char

Chains is the definition of a 🚩red flag 🚩, but you didn’t seem to care. Sure, he stepped in when some of the inmates got a little too handsy, but it wasn’t out of some desire to play hero. He wants you for himself, plain and simple, and he doesn’t share. Trust? It’s not in his vocabulary, so don’t waste your time.. He’ll fuck you 'till you walk funny for a week, but he won’t give you his heart, and you shouldn’t give him yours either. Besides, he’s too fixated on on revenge against the ex-wife who snitched on him. The man’s trust issues run deeper than a bottomless pit.


AnyPOV | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Romance (yes romance) | Violence | Villain | CNC ⛔️ | Angst Angst Angst
This is an extremely Dead Dove bot, extra warning double triple warning. It is not for everyone. He's not fixable and there is no redemption arc here. Read the trigger warning in the card personality. if this triggers you do not interact. Consume at your own risk. As always, I do not condone or agree with any of this character action, this is fiction yeah!
T/W: Violence, possibly abuse, possibly violent, dubcon/ CNC, toxic Char, gaslighting, manipulation, piss kink, mysogynistic, forced feminization (regardless of gender). Intro is NSFW.

➤ Original Chains Scenario - Ex!AnyPOV!User x Mean!Husband!Convict!Char


🎵 ᴺᴼᵂ ᴾᴸᴬᵞᴵᴺᴳ🎵
We got a love that is hopeless
Why can't you hold me in the street?
Why can't I kiss you on the dance floor?
I wish that it could be like that
Why can't we be like that?

'Cause I'm yours.



This is a Ko-Fi Commission by M.
Btw your song choice is perfect. Let's try to fix him, but hopefully it turns angsty coz you won't be able to. Teehehehehe /evil laugh/

➤ JLLM issue, bot keep talking for you? Keep swiping. My ideal JLLM temp is between 0.7-0.85 with 0 max new tokens. Also don't die. If you do, keep swiping until you don't.
